title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
